hooks.command: set -e; FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if [ -z "$FILE" ]; then exit 0; fi; CHANGED=$(git diff --name-only --diff-filter=d 2>/dev/null | grep '\.kt$' || echo ''); if [ -z "$CHANGED" ]; then exit 0; fi; echo "$CHANGED" | head -1 | { read -r F; PACKAGE=$(echo "$F" | sed 's|/| |g' | sed 's|\.kt||' | awk '{print $(NF-1)}'); if [ -z "$PACKAGE" ]; then ./gradlew detektFast 2>&1 | tail -5; ./gradlew test 2>&1 | tail -10; else ./gradlew detektFast 2>&1 | tail -5; ./gradlew test --tests "*$PACKAGE*" 2>&1 | tail -10; fi; }
hooks.statusMessage: Validando arquivos alterados com detekt e test...
